name: PVET - Custom Instructions
translate_prompt:
For this specific patent document detailing a universal joint plate for road construction, focus on accurately conveying the technical innovations and solutions proposed. The document addresses common issues in road construction, such as cracking and water infiltration, by introducing a joint plate with features like preformed dowel holes and anchoring ribs. Ensure that these technical solutions are clearly and accurately translated to highlight their significance and functionality.

Pay special attention to the translation of terms related to the structural components and materials used in the joint plate. The document emphasizes the use of recycled materials and the adaptability of the joint plate to various road types. Accurately translating these aspects is crucial to convey the environmental and practical benefits of the invention.

| Dutch term                  | English equivalent               | Notes / context                                                                 |
|-----------------------------|----------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| voegplaat                   | joint plate / expansion joint plate | A structural component used to join road sections.                              |
| wegdelen                    | road sections                    | Segments of a road construction.                                                |
| betonplaten                 | concrete slabs                   | Large, flat pieces of concrete used in road construction.                       |
| asfaltstroken               | asphalt strips                   | Narrow sections of asphalt used in paving.                                      |
| stabilisatiezone            | stabilization zone               | Area designed to stabilize the joint plate within the road structure.           |
| verankeringsribben          | anchoring ribs                   | Structural elements that provide anchorage for the joint plate.                 |
| deuvelgat                   | dowel hole                       | Preformed hole for inserting dowels to connect road sections.                   |
| verankeringszone            | anchoring zone                   | Area where anchoring ribs are positioned to distribute forces.                  |
| stabilisatieribben          | stabilization ribs               | Ribs that help stabilize the joint plate within the road structure.             |
| gerecycleerde materialen    | recycled materials               | Materials reused in the construction of the joint plate.                        |
| spuitgieten                 | injection molding                | A manufacturing process used to produce the joint plates.                       |
| dilatatievoegen             | expansion joints                 | Joints that allow for expansion and contraction of road sections.               |
| krimpvoegen                 | contraction joints               | Joints that accommodate the contraction of road materials.                      |
| deuvels                     | dowels                           | Rods used to connect and stabilize adjacent road sections.                      |
| verzaagbaar                 | sawable                          | The ability to cut the joint plate to fit different road dimensions.            |
| verankeringsrib             | anchoring rib                    | A rib that provides anchorage within the joint plate structure.                 |
| stabilisatierib             | stabilization rib                | A rib that provides stability within the joint plate structure.                 |
| lengtemaataanduiding        | length measurement indication    | Markings on the joint plate to assist with cutting and installation.            |
| beschermende coating        | protective coating               | A layer applied to protect the joint plate from environmental damage.           |
| thermoplastische vormgeving | thermoplastic shaping            | A process for forming thermoplastic materials into desired shapes.              |
| asfaltbeton                 | asphalt concrete                 | A composite material used for road surfaces.                                    |
| slijtlaag                   | wear layer                       | A thin layer applied to protect the road surface from wear and tear.            |
| fundering                   | foundation                       | The base layer of a road construction that provides structural integrity.       |
| onderfundering              | sub-base                         | The layer between the foundation and the stabilization layer.                   |
| rijlaag                     | surface layer                    | The top layer of a road that comes into contact with vehicles.                  |
| waterdoorlatende laag       | permeable layer                  | A layer that allows water to pass through, reducing surface water accumulation. |
| geluidsreducerende laag     | noise-reducing layer             | A layer designed to minimize noise from road traffic.                           |

In translating this document, be mindful of specific challenges such as maintaining the technical precision of terms like "voegplaat" (joint plate) and "deuvelgat" (dowel hole). These terms are critical for understanding the structural and functional aspects of the invention. Additionally, ensure that any references to measurements and technical processes are accurately conveyed, as these are essential for the practical application of the patent. Consistency in terminology, as outlined in the glossary, is vital for ensuring the document's clarity and professional integrity.
